tuning: E A D G B E
content:
NOTHING COMPARES 2 U - Sinead o'Connor
written by Prince

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C/E[/ch]
It's been seven hours and fifteen days,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm/C[/ch]
since you took your love away.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C/E[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm/C[/ch]
I go out every night and sleep all day, since you took your love away.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                 [ch]C/E[/ch]
Since you been gone, I can do whatever I want, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                           [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm/C[/ch]
I can see whomever i choose.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                              [ch]C/E[/ch]
I can eat my dinner in a fancy restaurant,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]                                  [ch]A7[/ch]
but nothing, I said, nothing, can take away the blues.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
'Cos nothing compares, nothing compares 2 U.[/tab]


[tab][ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]C/E[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm/C[/ch]
It's been so lonely without you here, like a bird without a song.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                             [ch]C/E[/ch]
Nothing can stop these lonely tears from falling,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]
tell me, baby, where did I go wrong?[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                [ch]C/E[/ch]
I could put my arms around every boy I see,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm/C[/ch]
but they only remind me of you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                      [ch]C/E[/ch]
I went to the doctor and guess what he told me, guess what he told me.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]                                          [ch]A7[/ch]
He said, Girl, you better try to have fun no matter what you do,[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
but he's a fool, cause nothing compares, nothing compares 2 U.[/tab]


[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                       [ch]C/E[/ch]
All the flowers that you planted, mama, in the back yard,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm/C[/ch]
all died when you went away.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                      [ch]C/E[/ch]
I know that living with you, baby, was sometimes hard,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                  [ch]A7[/ch]
but I'm willing to give you another try.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Nothing compares, nothing compares 2 U.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Nothing compares, nothing compares 2 U.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Nothing compares, nothing compares 2 U.[/tab]
